entry.title: New: Bill 2990 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-05-06
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND ORDINANCE NO. B-2025-905, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF KAUA‘I, STATE OF HAWAI‘I, FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2026, BY REVISING THE AMOUNTS ESTIMATED IN THE GENERAL FUND (Hawai‘i Fire Fighters’ Association, IAFF Local 1463 (HFFA), Bargaining Unit (BU) 11 Temporary Hazard Pay)

Latest action: On agenda 2026-05-06

View on the council site
